# KyvernLabs v0.2.0 — The Business Layer for the x402 Economy

> Revenue analytics, wallet management, and on-chain verification for x402 service providers.

## Products

**Pulse** — Revenue intelligence for x402 endpoints
**Vault** — Smart wallet monitoring for x402 providers

## Quick Integration

```typescript
import { withPulse } from '@kyvernlabs/pulse'
export const GET = withPulse(withX402(handler, config, server), { apiKey: 'kv_live_...' })
```

## npm Packages

- `@kyvernlabs/pulse` v0.1.0 — x402 analytics middleware
- `@kyvernlabs/mcp` v0.2.0 — MCP server (17 tools for AI agents)

## MCP Server (Claude Desktop)

```json
{ "mcpServers": { "kyvernlabs-pulse": { "command": "npx", "args": ["@kyvernlabs/mcp"], "env": { "KYVERNLABS_API_KEY": "kv_live_..." } } } }
```

17 tools: pulse_get_stats, pulse_get_endpoints, pulse_get_customers, pulse_get_transactions, pulse_get_timeseries, pulse_ingest_event, pulse_get_benchmarks, pulse_get_cohorts, pulse_search_transactions, pulse_get_endpoint_detail, pulse_get_customer_detail, pulse_get_alerts, pulse_create_alert, pulse_get_webhooks, pulse_get_market_intelligence, pulse_get_usage, pulse_health_check.

## Dashboard Pages

Overview, Transactions (search + pagination), Endpoints (sortable), Customers, Benchmarks (Pro), Cohorts (Pro), Intelligence (Pro), Webhooks (Pro), Alerts (Pro), API Keys, Setup Guide, Billing, Vault

## Features (Pro)

Pricing benchmarks, cohort retention analysis, competitive intelligence, smart alerts (5 types), webhooks (HMAC-SHA256), CSV export, 90-day retention, 10 API keys, dark mode, custom date ranges

## Pricing

- Free: 1,000 events/day or $10 revenue, 7-day retention, 1 key
- Pro ($49 USDC/month via x402): Unlimited, 90-day, all Pro features
- Enterprise: Custom

- Vault: https://kyvernlabs.com/vault
